tabs.description.en: Deep hydration formulas that replenish moisture and restore softness.
tabs.description.ar: تركيبات ترطيب عميقة تعيد النعومة والرطوبة.

tabs.description.en: Lightweight, oil-free solutions that mattify and balance.

tabs.description.en: Gentle, fragrance-free care that calms and protects delicate skin.

value.en: Our dermatologist-tested formula works in just 7 days.

value.en: A simple routine for radiant skin — morning and night.
value.ar: روتين بسيط لبشرة مشرقة — صباحًا ومساءً.

steps.description.en: Gently remove impurities with our botanical face wash.
steps.description.ar: أزيلي الشوائب بلطف مع غسولنا النباتي للوجه.

steps.description.en: Apply the vitamin C serum for brightening and protection.

fields.value: Full-width split section: large image on one side, editorial brand story on the other.

value.en: We believe in harnessing the power of botanicals, ethically sourced and crafted with care. Every formula is dermatologist-tested, cruelty-free, and designed to let your natural glow shine through.
value.ar: نؤمن بتسخير قوة النباتات، المصدرة بأخلاقية والمصنوعة بعناية. كل تركيبة مختبرة من أطباء الجلدية، ولم تُختبر على الحيوانات، ومصممة لإبراز توهجك الطبيعي.

milestones.description.en: Founded in a small kitchen with a dream for clean beauty.

milestones.description.en: Now shipping to 40+ countries with a team of 50.

reviews.text.en: I love the natural ingredients. Will definitely order again.
